---
title: "Proposed UI Design & Storyboard"
author: "LIN XIANWEI"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
editor: visual
---

# The FinRetain Narrative

Data without a narrative is just noise. Our storyboard maps out the complete journey of a FinTech customer—from their first deposit to their potential departure—and demonstrates how our Visual Analytics dashboard empowers stakeholders to intervene at the right moments.

## Section 1

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 215819.jpg)

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 215837.jpg)

## Section 2

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 215858.jpg)

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 215913.jpg)

## Section 3

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 220738.jpg)

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 220754.jpg)

## Section 4

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 220833.jpg)

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 220815.jpg)

## Section 5

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 220924.jpg)

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 220944.jpg)

## Section 6

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 221019.jpg)

![](images/Screenshot 2026-03-12 221039.jpg)

# Conclusion

The FinRetain dashboard proves that Visual Analytics is more than just plotting charts; it is about building a decision-making engine. By combining exploratory data analysis, algorithmic clustering, and predictive forecasting into a single, cohesive storyboard, we empower FinTech platforms to protect their most valuable asset: their users.
